author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Audit of remaining CPU roundtrips per token: (1) LayerNorm × 24 = 48 transfers. (2) GELU × 12 via unary_map = 24 transfers. (3) scale/mask tensor uploads × 24 = 24 transfers. (4) Embedding gather × 2 = small. Total: ~96 unnecessary CPU roundtrips per token. Fix: native GPU kernels for LayerNorm and GELU, plus move scale/mask creation outside the per-layer loop.
